summary: BTC Tools | Schedule | Verify Game Card Details
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools Game tile or the side nav bar
And !xray-attachment://7ef7f047-b4e8-4c07-b7a4-64b306530202|width=905,height=97!
Then the user should land on the BTC Schedule page by default
And the game card(s) are displayed, the user should see the following:
Team match up | Game PK | Venue | Game Date | Status
